items.title: Why Your Skills Are Worth Almost Nothing Right Now
items.description:

2) They can’t be stolen

items.channel_label: Vaibhav Sisinty — AI-first business, growth, LinkedIn
items.title: Claude's New Update Is Scarier Than You Think (+18 AI Updates)
items.description:
🔔 Get every tool, link, and step-by-step guide in our Staying Ahead community (free): https://links.stayingahead.com/YT51

OpenAI's new GPT-5.6 just beat Claude's Fable 5 on coding, and within days the US government restricted it, the exact same thing that happened to Fable 5 two weeks ago. Two of the most powerful AIs on earth, both locked away, while free open models race to catch up. Plus the real reason your MacBook just got more expensive, Claude becoming an AI coworker, and 18 updates that actually matter this week.

This is your full AI news roundup for the week, GPT-5.6, Claude Tag, AI inflation, NVIDIA's drug-discovery AI, free open-source models, and more, explained simply, no jargon.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 This Week in AI
01:05 OpenAI GPT-5.6 Beats Claude's Fable 5
03:10 AI Inflation: Why Apple Raised Prices
04:58 Claude Tag: Your New AI Coworker
08:29 NVIDIA BioNeMo: AI Discovers Medicine
09:17 Ornith: Free Open-Source Coding AI
10:02 Sakana Fugu: The Unbannable AI
10:56 ChatGPT GPT-5.5 Instant
11:54 Genspark Design: Sentence to App
13:04 Codex in the ChatGPT Mobile App
13:58 Gemini Study Notebooks (Free)
14:52 Notion AI Agents
16:06 ByteDance Seedance 2.5 AI Video
17:13 Hermes Open-Source AI Agent
18:04 Microsoft Excel Copilot Skills
18:55 AI Chip War: OpenAI Jalapeño + IBM
19:44 Figma Motion
20:43 Grok /goal
21:24 Perplexity Computer for Counsel
22:10 Genspark Full Tutorial (Build-Along)
30:10 Recap + Free Community Guide

📌 WHAT'S IN THIS EPISODE
- OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna), beats Claude's Fable 5 on Terminal-Bench, then gets US-government-restricted to a limited preview
- Why Apple raised MacBook and iPad prices overnight, the AI memory-chip crunch explained
- Claude Tag: Anthropic's AI "coworker" inside Slack, and the context lock-in nobody's talking about
- NVIDIA BioNeMo: AI agents that run real lab tools and design drug molecules in minutes
- Ornith: a new free, open, self-improving coding model
- Sakana's Fugu: an AI that matches the banned Fable 5 without using it
- Plus ChatGPT 5.5, Codex mobile, Gemini study notebooks, Notion agents, Seedance 2.5, Hermes, Excel Copilot, IBM's chip breakthrough, Grok, Figma Motion, and Perplexity for lawyers

#AINews #GPT56 #ClaudeAI #OpenAI #ArtificialIntelligence #AITools #Anthropic #NVIDIA #AIInflation #TechNews

items.title: How to Handle Team Pushback After Raising Prices
items.description:
Beyond a certain level, no one works for you anymore. They just work *with you.*

Because the people at that level have 100 other options begging to have them.

So you’re not doing them a favor by giving them a career. They’re doing you a favor by building you a company.
